title: polystichum rhizophyllum subsp. rhizophyllum
intro: Polystichum rhizophyllum subsp. rhizophyllum, also known as the creeping shield fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polystichum genus and is native to certain regions of Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum rhizophyllum subsp. rhizophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health issues.
